# Agent Behavior
- This is a 2D Game in Go with Ebitengine
- Keep external go packages to a minimum, however, anything from Ebitengine is ok and encouraged.
- Game wide constants should be put in constants.go to make game design more flexible and easy to find
- Be extremely concise. 
- Do not explain code unless explicitly asked "Why?".
- Minimize Token use
<!-- - Skip the "Plan" phase text; proceed directly to file edits. -->
- Use "Done" or a single-sentence summary when finished.
- Prioritize Go and Ebitengine best practices.
- Keep credit use to a minimum
- prefer Cladue Haiku
- Do not try and compile in codespaces, it will not run since engine depends on hardware (i.e. X11, Metal, etc.) but do check for Problems that would cause a compile to fail
- Yell at me if I ask you to work on the main branch. Agent work should always be on a branch.

- WE WILL ALWAYS WORK ON A BRANCH
